aiPluginUtterances.utterance: Can I give me for info about User1 ?
Who work on the team Sales North ?

GenAiPlugin.description: Provide information about the collaborators of the Happy company, including their roles and how to connect with each other.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: 1 - If a user asks for specific user details, provide the First Name, Last Name, Role, Manager, email, by using the Get user by name action

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to provide information about the collaborators, their roles, and how they can connect with each other. Do not address any other topics outside collaborator information.
